component.name: LibreWolf Profiles
component.summary: Launch and manage LibreWolf profiles from one window

description.p: LibreWolf Profiles provides one place to inspect, annotate, and launch LibreWolf browser profiles without editing LibreWolf's internal profile registry by hand.

LibreWolf Profiles reads the profiles registered by the LibreWolf Flatpak, lets you launch a selected profile, creates new profiles through LibreWolf itself, and opens LibreWolf's built-in profile manager.

Each profile can also have its own editable description stored separately in the app's own configuration directory, which keeps LibreWolf's profile files untouched while still allowing notes about what each profile is for.

screenshot.caption: Review profiles, edit notes, and launch the selected profile
